trivia_bullets.text: Bloodfell Caves is part of the cycle of ten gain lands first printed in Khans of Tarkir (September 2014). The Aetherdrift printing is its 15th appearance across MTG sets.

"To the Endriders, racing is worship. Their prayers rise on the howls of straining engines. Explosions punctuate their chorus of shouts, forming a hymn of glory to the open road and all roads to come." The Endriders are nomadic apocalypse-punk warriors from Gastal, a dying plane of permanent sunset.

Artist Ron Spencer is one of the original 25 Magic: The Gathering artists from Alpha (1993). He was largely inactive throughout the 2010s before returning with Double Masters; Aetherdrift represents his continued comeback.
